message:
Migrate bookmarks.rs from rusqlite to frankensqlite

Port BookmarkStore to use frankensqlite Connection, params!, query_row_map,
query_map_collect, execute_params, and TransactionExt. Replace
last_insert_rowid() method with SQL query. Add FrankenError re-export
to fsqlite facade crate for use in row mapping closures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
